TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mitiway, title = Mitiway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mitiway} }

S.FORM: === u lisin no cikawasay === matangasa i ralikur o mihecaan, o cikawasay katala i romaan. === sapakaen o tu'as i lumaan ===
S.PHON: === o~u~u ɾisin no~u ʦikawasaj === mataŋasa i raɾiko~u~ur o~u miħəʦaan, o~u ʦikawasaj kataɾa i ro~umaan. === sapakaən o~u to~u~uʡas i ɾo~u~umaan ===
S.FORM: === u lisin no cikawasay === matangasa i ralikur o mihecaan, o cikawasay katala i romaan. === sapakaen o tu'as i lumaan ===
S.PHON: === o~u~u ɾisin no~u ʦikawasaj === mataŋasa i raɾiko~u~ur o~u miħəʦaan, o~u ʦikawasaj kataɾa i ro~umaan. === sapakaən o~u to~u~uʡas i ɾo~u~umaan ===
